name: Cirila Medina
ai_summary: Cirila Medina brings over 20 years of childcare experience and a deep passion for working with children, seeking flexible hours in West Valley City, Utah. She uses redirection and giving children choices for conflict resolution and is available for both full-time and part-time shifts within a 10-15 mile radius.

transcripts.q3: there's I've worked at the same Center, I am looking for something that's more flexible and I can work on days that I would like to work
transcripts.q4: I live in West Valley, City Utah, and I'm willing to try to travel about 10 to 15 miles
transcripts.q5: I am looking for full-time or part-time and I'm available Monday through Fridays.
